languages.text: Теперь, когда колония в безопасности, стало очевидно: металлические твари пришли из руин, в которых оборвался след Себериана.
Now that the colony is safe, it is clear that the metal creatures came from the ruins where Seberian's trail ended.
languages.original_text: Теперь, когда колония в безопасности, стало очевидно: металлические твари пришли из руин, в которых оборвался след Себериана.

traits.locale_text: Now that the colony is safe, it is clear that the metal creatures came from the ruins where Seberian's trail ended.
Now that the colony is safe, it is clear that the metal creatures came from the ruins where Seberian's trail ended.
Now that the colony is safe, it is clear that the metal creatures came from the ruins where Seberian's trail ended.
Now that the colony is safe, it is clear that the metal creatures came from the ruins where Seberian's trail ended.

languages.text: コロニーが安全になった今、金属の生き物はシベリアンの足跡が途絶えた遺跡から来たことが明らかになった。
languages.original_text: Now that the colony is safe, it is clear that the metal creatures came from the ruins where Seberian's trail ended.

traits.locale_text: コロニーが安全になった今、金属の生き物はシベリアンの足跡が途絶えた遺跡から来たことが明らかになった。

languages.text: Ahora que la colonia está a salvo, está claro que las criaturas de metal vienen de las ruinas en las que acaba el rastro de Seberian.
languages.original_text: Now that the colony is safe, it is clear that the metal creatures came from the ruins where Seberian's trail ended.

traits.locale_text: Ahora que la colonia está a salvo, está claro que las criaturas de metal vienen de las ruinas en las que acaba el rastro de Seberian.

languages.text: Nun, da die Kolonie sicher ist, steht fest, dass die metallenen Kreaturen aus den Ruinen kamen, in denen sich Seberians Spur verliert.
languages.original_text: Now that the colony is safe, it is clear that the metal creatures came from the ruins where Seberian's trail ended.

traits.locale_text: Nun, da die Kolonie sicher ist, steht fest, dass die metallenen Kreaturen aus den Ruinen kamen, in denen sich Seberians Spur verliert.

languages.text: La colonie est à présent en sécurité. Il s'avère que les créatures métalliques proviennent des ruines où s'achève la piste de Seberian.
languages.original_text: Now that the colony is safe, it is clear that the metal creatures came from the ruins where Seberian's trail ended.

traits.locale_text: La colonie est à présent en sécurité. Il s'avère que les créatures métalliques proviennent des ruines où s'achève la piste de Seberian.

languages.text: 殖民地现已安全，那些金属生物显然来自塞贝里安踪迹消失的那片遗迹。
languages.original_text: Now that the colony is safe, it is clear that the metal creatures came from the ruins where Seberian's trail ended.

traits.locale_text: 殖民地现已安全，那些金属生物显然来自塞贝里安踪迹消失的那片遗迹。

languages.text: Koloni artık güvende olduğuna göre metal yaratıkların, Seberian'ın izinin son bulduğu harabelerden geldiği açık.
languages.original_text: Now that the colony is safe, it is clear that the metal creatures came from the ruins where Seberian's trail ended.

traits.locale_text: Koloni artık güvende olduğuna göre metal yaratıkların, Seberian'ın izinin son bulduğu harabelerden geldiği açık.
